SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.persist

Class ImmutableCategoryScore

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.persist.ImmutableCategoryScore
All Implemented Interfaces:
IRiskScore.ICategoryScore
public class ImmutableCategoryScore extends Object implements IRiskScore.ICategoryScore
Immutable implementation of IRiskScore.ICategoryScore for deserialized scan data.
Author:
Milton Smith

    getCategory()
    Built-in category enum, or null for custom user-defined categories.

    Individual deductions (matched rules) within this category.

    Diagnostics collected during this category's scoring.
    String

    Human-readable display name for this category.

    getRiskLevel()
    Risk level for this category based on its score.
    int
    getScore()
    Category sub-score (0-100), computed as average of matched rule scores.
    String

    Summary text describing the category's findings.

    • getDeductions

      public IRiskScore.IDeduction[] getDeductions()
      Description copied from interface: IRiskScore.ICategoryScore
      Individual deductions (matched rules) within this category.
      Specified by:
      getDeductions in interface IRiskScore.ICategoryScore
      Returns:
      Array of deductions, empty if no rules matched

    • getCategoryKey

      public String getCategoryKey()
      Description copied from interface: IRiskScore.ICategoryScore
      String key identifying this category. For built-in categories, returns the enum name (e.g., "PROTOCOLS"). For custom categories, returns the YAML key string (e.g., "PCI_COMPLIANCE").
      Specified by:
      getCategoryKey in interface IRiskScore.ICategoryScore
      Returns:
      Category key string, never null

    • getDiagnostics

      public IRiskScore.IScoringDiagnostic[] getDiagnostics()
      Description copied from interface: IRiskScore.ICategoryScore
      Diagnostics collected during this category's scoring.
      Specified by:
      getDiagnostics in interface IRiskScore.ICategoryScore
      Returns:
      Array of diagnostics, empty if no issues
